Veterans Benefits: Montana working military retirees may qualify for a military-retirement income-tax exemption; qualifying disabled veteran homeowners may receive income-based property-tax relief.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Missoula MEI scorecard; MAP Montana Equality Profile 2026
Description: Missoula is a western Montana university and regional-service city in the northern Rockies, with an in-city VA clinic, strong river and mountain access, and a visible arts and culture base. Housing costs are high for Montana, winters are snowy, and county-level presidential returns are clearly Democratic.
